summary: Exact-match work for Dolphin THP decoder code, centered on extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c, with THP decoder header and Melee caller signature cleanup after review rejected a temporary macro shim around thp.h prototypes.

key_files.role: Primary THP decoder implementation match work; changed function signatures, call sites, typed decode pointers, LCStoreData target updates, inline asm/register-local adjustments, and Huff decode matching edits.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDec.c updates __THPDecompressiMCURow640x480/__THPDecompressiMCURowNxN signatures and callers
text_corpus: bot report lists 3 new matches in main/dolphin/thp/THPDec

key_files.role: Owning THP header updated to match recovered implementation signatures and remove need for a prototype-hiding shim.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: thp.h changes THPDec_80331340 to 4 args and THPDec_803313D0 to 5 args with u32 width

key_files.role: Melee caller updated to match corrected THP decoder signatures.
evidence_refs: review_comment fjooord: two Melee callers were updated to match those signatures

key_files.role: Melee THP caller updated to match corrected THP decoder signatures.
evidence_refs: review_comment fjooord: two Melee callers were updated to match those signatures

key_files.role: Melee THP declaration surface adjusted with caller signature cleanup.

what_changed.text: Added 3 newly exact functions in THPDec according to the PR body and bot report: __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompU, __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompV, and THPDec_80331340.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Adds 3 newly exact function(s) in extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c

what_changed.text: Recovered THP row decompression helper signatures so they accept the THPFileInfo pointer directly, and for NxN also accept the decode width.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN(void) changed to __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN(THPFileInfo* info, u32 x)

what_changed.text: Corrected public THP decoder entry signatures: THPDec_80331340 takes 4 args, while THPDec_803313D0 takes width as a fifth argument.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDec_80331340 declaration changes from 5 args to 4 args
diff_excerpt: THPDec_803313D0 declaration changes from 4 args to 5 args with u32

what_changed.text: Removed the reviewed macro workaround around #include <dolphin/thp/thp.h> by fixing declarations and callers instead.
evidence_refs: review_comment ribbanya discussion_r3410123623: What is this? on macro shim
review_comment fjooord discussion_r3410300331: removed the shim and made declarations/call sites match implementation

what_changed.text: Changed THPDecodeInfo x8F0/x8F4/x8F8 fields from void* to u8* and used them directly for LCStoreData destinations and pointer increments.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDecodeInfo x8F0/x8F4/x8F8 changed from void* to u8*
diff_excerpt: LCStoreData uses ((THPDecodeInfo*) info)->x8F0/x8F4/x8F8 and increments those fields

what_changed.text: Adjusted inline assembly/register-local shapes in THP inverse DCT and Huff decode functions to reach matching code.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: __THPInverseDCTNoYPos cmpwi itmp2,0 changed to cmpwi r0,0
diff_excerpt: __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompU and __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompV register local and asm block changes
text_corpus bot report: Huff decode U/V functions became exact

smart_moves.text: The author resolved review feedback by removing a brittle macro shim and updating the real header plus call sites, limiting header churn to the corrected THP decoder prototypes.
evidence_refs: pr_body: Header/naming churn limited to correcting THP decoder prototypes

smart_moves.text: The PR kept verification scoped to touched objects and relevant checks: configure, THPDec/lb object builds, objdiff for named functions, tools.check, and git diff --check.
Passing THPFileInfo and width explicitly into row decompression helpers made dependencies visible instead of relying only on the global __THPInfo or an internal xPixelSize fetch.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered implementation signature conflicts with a header, update the owning header and real call sites rather than hiding the mismatch with local identifier-renaming macros around an include.

For helper functions that were previously using globals or internal field reads, matching may require surfacing the original arguments explicitly in both the static helper declaration and all callers.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN now accepts THPFileInfo* and u32 x

decomp_lessons.lesson: Typed pointer fields can simplify pointer increments and LCStoreData call sites compared with void* fields and repeated casts.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDecodeInfo x8F0/x8F4/x8F8 changed to u8*
diff_excerpt: increments of ((THPDecodeInfo*) info)->x8F0/x8F4/x8F8 without u8* casts

naming_conventions.text: Address-style names such as THPDec_80331340 and THPDec_803313D0 were retained while their signatures were corrected; no semantic rename was introduced without evidence.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPDec_80331340 and THPDec_803313D0 names unchanged while argument lists changed

naming_conventions.text: Local variable names in Huff decode matching were shaped around bitstream roles such as nbits, cnt, cnt33, cb, tmp, code, and cnt12, but the PR evidence does not establish a global naming rule for these names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used narrow inline assembly/register-local adjustments in MWERKS-guarded Huff decode sections to close __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompU and __THPHuffDecodeDCTCompV.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: both Huff decode functions moved to 100.00%

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Changed a specific inline asm compare operand in __THPInverseDCTNoYPos from a named register variable to r0.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: cmpwi itmp2, 0 changed to cmpwi r0, 0

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Removed temporary locals like comp/x_pos in selected row decode paths and used direct expressions such as info->components[n].quantizationTableSelector and cl_num-derived offsets where that matched better.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: removed THPComponent* comp use in __THPDecompressiMCURow640x480 and __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN
diff_excerpt: direct cl_num * 16 and cl_num * 8 expressions in __THPDecompressiMCURowNxN

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Verification cited by the PR included objdiff-cli diff for lbMthp8001FAA0, fn_8001EF5C, and THPDec_80331340 at 100.0%, plus bot-reported THPDec improvements.

review_feedback.feedback: Questioned a macro block that renamed THP decoder symbols before including thp.h and then undefined them.
review_feedback.resolution: Author said it was hiding stale prototypes after implementation signatures changed, removed the shim, updated thp.h and call sites, and removed the EditorConfig workaround.

review_feedback.feedback: Asked what issue was being caused by editorconfig and said the PR looked good other than the weird defines.
review_feedback.resolution: After the shim and EditorConfig workaround were removed, the later review state was APPROVED.

follow_up_queries: Find other PRs where local #define shims were used around includes to hide stale prototypes.
Search for THPDec_80331340 and THPDec_803313D0 call sites to verify all declarations stayed aligned after PR 2681.
Search THPDec.c for remaining void* decode buffer fields or repeated casts that could be typed.
Find Dolphin extern PRs with review concerns about changes outside src/.
Search for [skip editorconfig] or EditorConfig workarounds in decomp PR history.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, timestamps, changed files
review_comments: macro shim review and author fix
text_corpus: bot match report and review state sequence
diff_excerpt: concrete signature, typing, call-site, and asm changes
notes: The raw diff is truncated, so later parts of THPDec.c and the small lb caller hunks are not fully visible in loaded evidence.
Verification results are PR-authored and bot-comment evidence; no independent build or objdiff was run during intake.
The claim that two Melee callers were updated is supported by review text and changed-file metadata, but exact caller line changes are not visible in the loaded diff excerpt.
Inline asm/register-local tactics are observable in the diff, but the precise reason each register name change matched is not explained beyond match reports.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Fix real prototypes instead of include-time macro shims
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2681 shows review pushback on a macro block that renamed THP decoder symbols around #include <dolphin/thp/thp.h>. The accepted fix was to remove the shim and update thp.h declarations plus call sites to match the recovered implementations.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recovered helper parameters can replace hidden global dependencies
accepted_candidate_records.text: THP row decompression helpers changed from no-arg functions using __THPInfo or internal width reads to helpers receiving THPFileInfo* and, for NxN, a width argument; callers were updated accordingly.

source_update_candidates.title: Avoid include-time prototype-hiding macro shims
source_update_candidates.text: When implementation recovery proves a signature mismatch, update the owning header and call sites instead of using #define/#undef blocks around an include to hide stale prototypes.
source_update_candidates.reason: Current standards already discourage fake local declarations and define aliases; this PR provides concrete review evidence for the include-shim variant.

source_update_candidates.title: THP decoder path crosses extern Dolphin and Melee lb callers
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2681 changed extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c and extern/dolphin/include/dolphin/thp/thp.h, with small signature-alignment changes in src/melee/lb/lb_01F8.c, src/melee/lb/lbmthp.c, and src/melee/lb/lbmthp.h.
source_update_candidates.reason: May help future path-scope lookup for THP decoder work that requires lb caller/header updates.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize that all extern/dolphin changes are low risk; this PR only states low review risk for this specific slice with touched caller object-diff checks.
Do not promote the exact THPDec_80331340/THPDec_803313D0 names to semantic names; the PR retained address-style names and only corrected signatures.
Do not treat inline assembly/register steering as generally accepted style from this PR; standards require narrow evidence, and the PR evidence only supports these specific THPDec matching edits.
Do not claim all functions in THPDec.c matched; bot evidence shows 3 new matches and 4 improvements, with some functions still below 100%.
